emails.subject: RE: What happened to you?
emails.body: RE: What happened to you? did you get my message, i left it on your voice mail. I had a doctors appt, at sat more longer than i was treated. i just got in, would you like to meet now? To: Rabon, Chance

emails.subject: RE: What happened to you?
emails.body: sure....i don't have a phone, hence no message To: Scott, Susan M.

emails.subject: RE: What happened to you?
emails.body: i will be over in about 10 mins To: Rabon, Chance
